expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Workspace Member Management feature decomposition",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Invite member by email",
      "description": "Admins can invite a member by email; invite creates pending membership and sends email.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Invite API accepts email and role",
        "Pending member record created",
        "Email invitation sent (or queued)",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/routes/members.ts",
        "src/server/services/inviteService.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Change member role",
      "description": "Admins can change role between viewer, editor, admin.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Role change persists to DB",
        "Permissions reflect role change",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/services/rolesService.ts",
        "src/web/pages/WorkspaceSettings.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Revoke workspace access",
      "description": "Admins can revoke access, removing membership and invalidating sessions if applicable.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Revoke API removes membership or marks revoked",
        "Access denied after revoke",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/services/membershipService.ts",
        "src/web/pages/WorkspaceSettings.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Record membership changes in audit log",
      "description": "Membership invites, role changes, and revokes write an audit entry.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Audit entries created for invite/role/revoke",
        "Audit schema and query exist",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "migrations/20260618_add_audit_log.sql",
        "src/server/services/auditService.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Review recent membership changes UI",
      "description": "Workspace settings page shows recent membership changes with pagination.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Audit view shows recent entries",
        "Admins can filter by action and date",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/web/pages/WorkspaceSettings.tsx",
        "src/web/components/AuditList.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.

expectations.text: No story title is a horizontal layer split such as build backend or build frontend.
